## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Unusual Ventures and Marcel Santilli's growth marketing company, GrowthActs.](https://fathom.video/share/ivQtbKu9AfXaSAgPAgKCJw3n5NZQW_vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Unusual Ventures focuses on providing hands-on support to early-stage startups, addressing common pitfalls in scaling and go-to-market strategies](https://fathom.video/share/ivQtbKu9AfXaSAgPAgKCJw3n5NZQW_vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [GrowthActs offers specialized, AI-enhanced growth marketing services at $9,000/month per workstream, with a focus on organic content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/ivQtbKu9AfXaSAgPAgKCJw3n5NZQW_vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Both parties expressed interest in collaborating, particularly for Unusual Ventures' portfolio company HumanSignal and potentially for Unusual Ventures itself](https://fathom.video/share/ivQtbKu9AfXaSAgPAgKCJw3n5NZQW_vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)

## Topics

### Unusual Ventures' Approach

  - [Founded \~8 years ago to address gaps in traditional VC support](https://fathom.video/share/ivQtbKu9AfXaSAgPAgKCJw3n5NZQW_vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Focuses on few, high-quality investments with intensive support](https://fathom.video/share/ivQtbKu9AfXaSAgPAgKCJw3n5NZQW_vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Provides experienced professionals to work directly with portfolio companies](https://fathom.video/share/ivQtbKu9AfXaSAgPAgKCJw3n5NZQW_vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Aims to improve success rates for early-stage startups (currently only \~9% of Series A companies reach Series B)](https://fathom.video/share/ivQtbKu9AfXaSAgPAgKCJw3n5NZQW_vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)

### GrowthActs' Services and Methodology

  - [Offers repeatable "growth engine" workstreams at $9,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/ivQtbKu9AfXaSAgPAgKCJw3n5NZQW_vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Services include editorial content, programmatic SEO, and AI-enhanced outbound marketing](https://fathom.video/share/ivQtbKu9AfXaSAgPAgKCJw3n5NZQW_vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Utilizes AI workflows with human experts in the loop for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/ivQtbKu9AfXaSAgPAgKCJw3n5NZQW_vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
  - [Achieved $3 million ARR in 5 months with 25 clients](https://fathom.video/share/ivQtbKu9AfXaSAgPAgKCJw3n5NZQW_vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Focuses on organic growth strategies, viewing paid acquisition as unsustainable](https://fathom.video/share/ivQtbKu9AfXaSAgPAgKCJw3n5NZQW_vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)

### Potential Collaboration Opportunities

  - [HumanSignal: An Unusual Ventures portfolio company in AI quality assurance](https://fathom.video/share/ivQtbKu9AfXaSAgPAgKCJw3n5NZQW_vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [Unusual Ventures itself: Content creation and thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/ivQtbKu9AfXaSAgPAgKCJw3n5NZQW_vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Exploration of how GrowthActs' services could benefit early-stage startups in Unusual's portfolio](https://fathom.video/share/ivQtbKu9AfXaSAgPAgKCJw3n5NZQW_vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)

### Startup Challenges and Solutions

  - [Founders often struggle with hiring for roles outside their expertise](https://fathom.video/share/ivQtbKu9AfXaSAgPAgKCJw3n5NZQW_vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Time lost due to poor hires can be critical for early-stage companies](https://fathom.video/share/ivQtbKu9AfXaSAgPAgKCJw3n5NZQW_vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [GrowthActs offers a solution by providing expert-level service without the need for full-time hires](https://fathom.video/share/ivQtbKu9AfXaSAgPAgKCJw3n5NZQW_vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send a Slack connect invitation to John for easier communication](https://fathom.video/share/ivQtbKu9AfXaSAgPAgKCJw3n5NZQW_vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
  - [John to introduce Marcel to Penny and Scott from Unusual Ventures team](https://fathom.video/share/ivQtbKu9AfXaSAgPAgKCJw3n5NZQW_vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
  - [Explore potential engagement with HumanSignal](https://fathom.video/share/ivQtbKu9AfXaSAgPAgKCJw3n5NZQW_vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Consider a trial of GrowthActs' services for Unusual Ventures' own content creation](https://fathom.video/share/ivQtbKu9AfXaSAgPAgKCJw3n5NZQW_vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
